collections.name: users
collections.schema: export interface User { id: string; username: string; role: string; name: string; assignedClasses?: string[]; childrenIds?: string[]; phone?: string; mustChangePassword?: boolean; }
collections.rules:
allow read: if request.auth != null;
allow write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: students
collections.schema: export interface Student { id: string; fullName: string; class: string; birthDate: string; parentName?: string; parentPhone?: string; notes?: string; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: academicResults
collections.schema: export interface AcademicResult { id: string; studentId: string; classId: string; level: string; subject: string; examLabel: string; trimester: number; score: number; coefficient?: number; recordedAt: string; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: schedules
collections.schema: export interface ScheduleCell { subject?: string; teacher?: string; room?: string; colorIdx: number; startTime: string; endTime: string; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: absences
collections.schema: export interface AttendanceRecord { id: string; classId: string; date: string; studentId: string; present: boolean; recordedBy: string; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: homeworks
collections.schema: export interface Homework { id: string; title: string; description: string; classes: string[]; subject: string; session: string; fileName?: string; fileData?: string; uploadDate: string; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: newsFeeds
collections.schema: export interface Post { id: string; author: string; role: string; date: string; content: string; audience: string; images: string[]; likes: number; likedByCurrentUser: boolean; comments: any[]; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: messages
collections.schema: export interface Message { id: string; name: string; subject: string; message: string; timestamp: string; read: boolean; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: parents
collections.schema: export interface ParentUser { id: string; fullName: string; phone: string; passwordHash: string; mustChangePassword: boolean; childrenIds: string[]; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;

collections.name: schoolSettings
collections.schema: export interface SchoolBranding { schoolNameFr: string; schoolNameAr: string; logoDataUrl?: string; stampDataUrl?: string; updatedAt: string; }
collections.rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null;
